home.hero_subtitle: Your time is valuable. Book what you need quickly and elegantly.
home.services_subtitle: Select the service you need and book your appointment.
home.cta_subtitle: Forget about waiting on the phone and unanswered messages. With ProReserve, booking your ideal spot is fast, simple, and elegant.
home.cta_feature_1_desc: Find the best local venues with real reviews.
home.cta_feature_2_desc: Receive automatic notifications so you're never late for your plans.

categories.health_desc: Take care of your physical well-being

business.title: Are you a business?
business.subtitle: Join the most advanced booking management platform.
business.desc: ProReserve offers all the necessary tools for your business to grow smoothly.
business.feature_1_desc: Interactive calendar and automated appointment management.
business.feature_2_desc: Get to know your customers better with detailed booking reports.
business.feature_3_desc: A transparent model designed for you to earn more.

footer.description: Simplifying your reservation management with modern and efficient technology. Your time is valuable, we help you optimize it.
footer.subscribe_desc: Join ProReserve and start making your bookings quickly, easily, and with style.

services_page.hero_subtitle: Explore our complete selection of available services to book.
services_page.step_1_desc: Browse through the categories and find the venue or service you need.
services_page.step_2_desc: Choose the date and time that suits you best in real time.
services_page.step_3_desc: Confirm your booking and get ready to enjoy your experience.
services_page.faq_1_a: Yes, ProReserve is completely free for making reservations.
services_page.faq_2_q: How do I cancel a booking?
services_page.faq_2_a: You can cancel or reschedule from your personal user profile.
services_page.faq_3_a: Yes, we'll send you notifications so you don't forget your appointments.

contact_page.hero_subtitle: Whether you're a user looking for help or a business eager to innovate, we're here to listen.
contact_page.form_success_message: Thank you for contacting us. We'll respond in less than 24 hours.
contact_page.form_subject_user: I'm a user and I need help
contact_page.form_subject_business: I have a business and want to join
contact_page.form_message_placeholder: Tell us more details about what you need...
contact_page.form_privacy_and: and the processing of my data.

information.title: Profile Information
information.description: Update your account's profile information and email address.
information.name: Name
information.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
information.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Update Password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted.
delete.warning: Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
delete.modal_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete.modal_description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
